Summary

Provide a brief overview of what this PR does.

    Example: Adds a new set of Tier 2 decorative pedestals.

Type of Change

    [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)

    [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)

    [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing worlds/configs to break)

    [ ] Documentation update

Testing Checklist

    [ ] The mod launches without errors in client-main.txt and server-main.txt.

    [ ] The new feature/fix has been verified in-game.

    [ ] All new assets (shapes/textures) load correctly without "missing texture" sprites.
